title: 3 Money Truths Nobody Tells You

segments.text: Saving money alone will never make you rich.
But the reason why is the part nobody explains.
Inflation quietly eats your savings every single year.
The wealthy turn income into assets, not just savings.
And they let those assets earn money for them.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Saving alone won't make you rich — assets do. Follow for daily money wisdom!

title: Why the Rich Get Richer

segments.text: The rich get richer because their money makes money.

Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

title: Why the Rich Buy Assets First

scenes.text: The rich don't buy things. They buy things that pay them.
An asset puts money in your pocket. A liability takes it out. Most people fill their lives with liabilities that just look like success.
The wealthy buy the asset first, then let it pay for the lifestyle. The car comes after the investment, not before.
Every dollar is a seed. Spend it and it's gone. Plant it and it grows.
scenes.label: PLANT, DON'T SPEND

scenes.text: Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: The rich buy assets first and let them pay for the lifestyle. Master the difference between an asset and a liability. Follow for daily money wisdom!

title: Pay Yourself First

scenes.text: Most people save what's left after spending. The wealthy spend what's left after saving.
The moment the paycheck lands, a slice goes straight to savings and investments, before a single bill.
It works because you never see the money, so you never miss it. The habit builds the wealth, not the amount.
Automate it once, and your future self gets paid on autopilot.
scenes.label: AUTOMATE IT

scenes.text: Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Don't save what's left after spending - spend what's left after saving. Automate it and pay your future self first. Follow for daily money wisdom!
